choices.text: Gazebo (formerly Ignition) — open-source ROS-integrated simulator. Realistic physics + sensor plugins (camera, LiDAR, IMU). URDF/SDF robot description. ros2_control runs same code in sim + real. Train RL with millions of trials safely.

Simulator ≠ reality (sensor noise, friction, dynamics approximations). Mitigations: domain randomization (vary sim params), realistic sensor models, fine-tune on hardware. Final test always on real robot.

questions.explanation: Bridge gap via domain randomization + hw fine-tune.
